name: Appealing Denied Occupational Illness in Boise

mainEntity.name: What if my employer denies my occupational illness is work-related in Boise?
mainEntity.text: What if my employer denies my occupational illness is work-related in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal Boise occupational illness denials to Idaho Industrial Commission within 1 year. Submit counter-medical evidence and request hearing. Attorney representation advised.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho employers must provide panel doctors; if denied, select your own IME. Common denials cite alternative causes like smoking. Boise-Murray commuters benefit from dual-state firms contesting via depositions. Success rates rise with expert testimony refuting defenses.[1]
